name: Flybuys
one_liner: Australia's biggest loyalty program — earn points at Coles, BP, Kmart, Target, and more.
benefit: Earn 1 point per $1 at Coles supermarkets, BP fuel, Kmart, Target, and partner stores; redeem for Coles dollars ($10 off per 2,000 pts), gift cards, or Velocity frequent flyer miles; regular bonus point events at Coles.

how_to_join.action: Sign up for free at flybuys.com.au or in-store at any Coles supermarket
Download the Flybuys app to access personalised bonus offers
how_to_join.detail: Activate bonus point offers in the app each week before shopping.

how_to_join.action: Link your card to the Coles app for contactless barcode scanning at checkout

risks: Points expire after 18 months of inactivity — make at least one earning transaction per 18 months
Earning rate is modest (~0.5c per dollar); the main value is bonus-point events and targeted offers
est_value: ~$20–50/year in Coles dollars for typical grocery spend when bonus events are used
